arts.ttl: 'Not the right signal' - Arne Slot explains what he won't now do to Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has detailed what won't happen with the Reds as backing expressed for Southampton boss Russell Martin

arts.ttl: Arne Slot backs up Pep Guardiola opinion ahead of Liverpool's trip to Southampton
arts.sum: Arne Slot has joined Pep Guardiola in voicing his admiration for Southampton manager Russell Martin for sticking steadfastly to his principles despite results

arts.ttl: Liverpool coach 'instructed' to seal 32-year-old transfer as 'first contact' made
arts.sum: Turkish Super Lig giants Galatasaray reportedly emerge as shock contenders to sign Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson Becker in 2025.

arts.ttl: Southampton have more quality than most Eredivisie sides, warns Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool coach wary of facing bottom team Slot praises Russell Martin for sticking to his principles Arne Slot has said he is having to raise his game because the standard running through the Premier League from top to bottom is so high. The Dutchman has led Liverpool to the summit after 11 games and quickly realised the step up in quality from the Eredivisie. On Sunday Liverpool travel to bottom-of-the-table Southampton, where Slot is not expecting a walkover, as he believes any team in the division can defeat any other. Despite Southampton winning once this season, Slot praised Russell Martin for sticking to his principles of possession-based football. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool facing nervy Arne Slot ban wait as Pep Guardiola avoids nightmare Man City scenario
arts.sum: Liverpool news as Pep Guardiola survives nightmare Manchester City scenario but still remains on the brink of a ban

arts.ttl: Arne Slot 'keeping an eye on' three players as Liverpool face difficult decision
arts.sum: Arne Slot is assessing the fitness of Alexis Mac Allister, Luis Diaz and Darwin Nunez ahead of Liverpool's Premier League clash at Southampton on Sunday

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes admission about tired Liverpool trio ahead of Southampton trip
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot admits he will be taking no chances with his selection as he prepares for games against Real Madrid and Manchester City following the trip to Southampton

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot claims British managers are underestimated in their own country - as the Dutchman heaps praise on under-fire Russell Martin ahead of Southampton clash
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Slot's leaders travel to last-place Southampton whose Brighton-born boss Russell Martin is being criticised for sticking to purist principles during a relegation battle.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Manchester City: Arne Slot Premier League title edge over Pep Guardiola after Tottenham Hotspur loss
arts.sum: Liverpool have a psychological edge over Premier League title rivals Manchester City and Arsenal, and are in pole position to take advantage of their stumbling opponents.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes telling Premier League title Liverpool admission after Man City lose again
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola admitted that Manchester City's grip on the Premier League will be over if they lose at Anfield next week.
